AddParsingRecords.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters.
AddParsingRecords.rr: Host record, e.g. "www". The combined length of the record value and zone name must not exceed 255 characters.
AddParsingRecords.value: Record value. Examples — IP: "192.168.1.1", CNAME: "cname.baidu.com", MX: "mail.baidu.com", SRV: priority weight port target separated by spaces, e.g. "0 6 8080 vipserver.test.com".
AddParsingRecords.ttl: TTL of the DNS record cached on local DNS servers (in seconds). Default: 300s (Basic), 120s (Standard), 1s (Enterprise). Must be a positive integer.
AddParsingRecords.line: Resolution line or line group name. Default is "default". Basic and Standard editions support: default, ct (China Telecom), cmnet (China Mobile), cnc (China Unicom), edu (Education Network), search (Baidu Search Engine). For Enterprise edition line values, see [LineName](DNS/API参考/附录.md#LineName). Enterprise edition also accepts line group names.
AddParsingRecords.priority: Priority of the MX record. Valid range: [0, 50]. Required when the record type is MX.
